Related Work.target_emphasis: Bridge the gap by demonstrating that existing literature lacks physically interpretable mechanisms to break the view-consistency assumption in complex scenes.

focus_areas: Overall architecture and data flow of the proposed framework
Module 1: Physical material classification via dual-mask and MRI-like k-space analysis
Module 2: Ternary Mask adaptive energy adjustment using GCD and SAM
Module 3: Component-aware depth estimation framework based on BRDF fitting
